original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: skill-installer
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos).
original_frontmatter_snapshot.short-description: Install curated skills from openai/skills or other repos
